name: transfer_to_agent
description: Transfer to specialist agents based on task type

transfers.condition: User needs desktop automation, file operations, window control, or system tasks
transfers.transfer_message: I'll transfer you to the Desktop Worker who can handle that.

transfers.condition: User needs document creation, writing, editing, or content generation
transfers.transfer_message: I'll transfer you to the Project Writer who specializes in that.

transfers.condition: User wants to chat, needs clarification, or task is complete
transfers.transfer_message: Let me transfer you back to continue our conversation.
